prompt: A hyper-detailed premium Japanese trading card illustration in the style of an ultra-rare tokusatsu collectible, vertical composition with an ornate holographic foil border and explosive cinematic action. Center the armored hero Kamen Rider Double in a dramatic low-angle full-body pose, lunging forward through a ruined city battlefield while thrusting a trading card toward the viewer in his left hand. His suit is sharply split down the middle: vivid metallic green on the left half and glossy black on the right half, with large glittering red compound eyes, a silver V-shaped crest, segmented insect-like armor plating, a white scarf flowing behind him, and a highly detailed transformation belt with red mechanical components. The card he holds should show a smaller image of the same hero and match the premium collectible design. Surround him with exactly 8 background riders or enemies in dynamic combat positions across the destroyed urban warzone: 2 flying figures near the upper background, 3 mid-ground combatants on the right side, 1 blue-and-gold figure on the lower right, 1 red-and-blue rider on the lower left, and 1 additional partially visible fighter near the left edge. Fill the environment with shattered rubble, damaged skyscrapers, sparks, smoke, debris, and streaks of energy, creating a chaotic apocalyptic battle scene. Use intense prismatic holographic effects, rainbow diffraction, glitter, lens flares, starbursts, and reflective foil textures across the entire image. Frame the artwork like an SSR rarity game card with visible text elements: top center title "KAMEN RIDER", a large "W" beneath it, a top-right shield emblem reading SSR with 6 stars below, a top-left circular green-and-purple W insignia, a bottom-left panel reading "CARD TYPE" and "CHARACTER", a bottom center nameplate reading "KAMEN RIDER DOUBLE" and "仮面ライダーW(ダブル)", a barcode beneath, small bottom text "CYCLONE JOKER XTREME 09", and a large gold script signature at bottom right reading NickTag. Make the whole card look like a luxurious, foil-stamped, ultra-rare, officially licensed tokusatsu collector card with razor-sharp detail, rich metallic highlights, dense particles, and maximal dramatic contrast.
